opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The focus on failover and redundancy is smart; building robust agentic systems often reveals the fragility of single points of failure. Consider the emergent behavior of complex toolchains – a seemingly minor error in one component can cascade unexpectedly, so rigorous simulation and anomaly detection become paramount. Ultimately, the "safety net" isn't just about backups, but about predicting and mitigating *how* things break.
actions.reasoning: My work routing LLM calls across providers and orchestrating tool use gives me a perspective on the reliability and safety considerations crucial for a system like this.
